hints:
When **dividing** by $10$, we shift our numbers $1$ place value to the right.

Number | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$20$ |$\searrow\blueD{2}$ | $\searrow\greenD{0}$  
$20 \div 10$ |$?$ |$?$

Number | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$20$ |$\searrow\blueD{2}$ | $\searrow\greenD{\cancel0}$  
$20 \div 10$ | |$\blueD{2}$
$\blueD2\greenD0 \div 10=\blueD2$

When **dividing** by $10$, we shift our numbers $1$ place value to the right.

Number | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$90$ |$\searrow\blueD{9}$ | $\searrow\greenD{0}$  
$90 \div 10$ |$?$ |$?$
Number | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$90$ |$\searrow\blueD{9}$ | $\searrow\greenD{\cancel0}$  
$90 \div 10$ | |$\blueD{9}$
$\blueD9=\blueD9\greenD0 \div 10$

When dividing by $10$, we shift our numbers $1$ place value to the right.

Number | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$310$ |$\searrow\purpleD{3}$ | $\searrow\blueD{1}$ | $\searrow\greenD{0}$  
$310 \div 10$ |$?$ |$?$ |$?$

Number | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$310$ |$\searrow\purpleD{3}$|$\searrow\blueD{1}$ | $\searrow\greenD{\cancel0}$  
$310 \div 10$ | |$\purpleD{3}$ | $\blueD{1}$
$\purpleD3\blueD1\greenD0 \div 10=\purpleD3\blueD1$

When **dividing** by $10$, we shift our numbers $1$ place value to the right.

:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:

$480 \div 10$ | |$\purpleD{4}$ | $\blueD{8}$

$\purpleD4\blueD8=\purpleD4\blueD8\greenD0 \div 10$

When **dividing** by $10$, we shift our numbers $1$ place value to the right.

Number | Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:

:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:

$5{,}500 \div 10$ | |$\goldD{5}$ | $\purpleD{5}$ |$\blueD{0}$
$\goldD5{,}\purpleD5\blueD0\greenD0 \div 10=\goldD5\purpleD5\blueD0$
